description: A merchandiser needs to update the description and specifications for an existing product to include new features.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the product details using its SKU.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly pulls the existing product information for 'Laptop-XG-123'.

nodes.task_description: Update the product's description and specifications fields with the new text provided.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the product information in the PIM system.

nodes.task_description: Verify the changes by previewing the product page.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the new description and specs are live on the storefront.
